info.name: ApiSensitivities Test Collection
info.description: Collection of test cases for ApiSensitivities project, focusing on context-aware desensitization.

request.description: Tests automatic detection of FINANCIAL_ADVICE scenario. Expects bank card to be detected with lower threshold.
Tests automatic detection of MEDICAL_CONSULTATION scenario. Expects ID card and Name to be detected.
Tests automatic detection of CODE_DEVELOPMENT scenario. Expects API Key to be detected.
Tests automatic detection of GENERAL_CHAT scenario. Expects higher threshold, so the random number string should NOT be detected as a bank card.
Tests manual override to force FINANCIAL_ADVICE scenario. Even with generic text, the number should be treated as a bank card due to strict financial context.
